replies.msg: 明明睇過哂機箱夠位，但係實裝又唔夠

EK Cyrofuel Solid 呢隻 coolant d 色真係好實淨，勁好 J

以前要有咁實淨既色要 Pastel coolant 先做到，但用耐左有幾會塞 block


So far Cyrofuel Solid 我用左兩三個月未有變色，遲下打散 d 野睇下有冇塞 block 或者有積先，理論上就唔會，EK 話 Solid 呢隻 coolant 唔係 pastel coolant 黎，唔會有粒子


EK Cyrofuel 同 PrimeChill 既 Vue 係永不錄用既，中過大伏

Dear Adrian,

We are contacting you further to your issues with Shadow of the Tomb Raider.

Under-clocking your GPU could help with stability when playing the game in DX12 mode.

Please try the following to see if it helps:

- Install MSI afterburner from the following website: http://gaming.msi.com/features/afterburner
- Once installed, run the application and set CoreClock slider to -100 (note the minus sign)
- Click on apply
- Now try running the game

*Note - these settings will reset on system restart. If you wish to save these settings, tick the ’Apply overclocking at system startup‘ option.

We are aware that users are encountering issues using RTX cards in DX12 mode and are looking into these issues. Unfortunately, we do not have any information to provide on the caues or future of the issue. Please keep an eye on our social media channels and on the Steam page for the game for updates.


Kind regards,

The Square Enix Support Centre team
